case_title: FIDELITY CREDITOR SERVICE, INC. vs. RICHARDSON, WILLIAM B.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIDELITY CREDITOR SERVICE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, WILLIAM B.
